_publications._publicationTitle: Nf1 heterozygous mice recapitulate the anthropometric and metabolic features of human neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: after a brief fast of 5 hours, Nf1 +/− mice had dramatically lower starting blood glucose concentrations when compared to WT mice...Nf1 +/− mice exhibited a much slower recovery period from 45–90 minutes
details: Dramatically lower starting blood glucose concentrations after 5-hour fast and slower recovery period from 45-90 minutes in insulin tolerance test
